_comment: ACTIVE EVAL CAMPAIGN — operator-maintained ground truth for the live 50K eval. The dashboard's MISSION panel + the 3D reactor launch rail both read this. balance_source='operator' means eye-confirmed off the Apex dashboard at balance_asof; auto-flips to live read-back once the :9222 panel is readable. EVERY EVAL RENDERS A LAUNCH-RAIL VEHICLE automatically from two sources, deduped by account label: (1) any EVAL-phase account the bot registers in /api/state, and (2) this file. To show ANOTHER concurrent eval, add an object to the optional 'evals' array below with {account_label,start_balance,current_balance,target_balance,clock_start,clock_days} — it appears on the next poll, no code change.
checklist: open + pin Tradovate panel in :9222 Chrome (readable)
